potential injection attacks if `/api/login` is not designed to parse parame[6D[K
parameters strictly from the URL path/query. An attacker could craft a mali[4D[K
malicious URL, e.g., `login("http://attacker.com?u=1&c=2")`. If the server [K

authentication or inject arbitrary data into the login endpoint's payload. [K
